_comment: Example browser-voice workflow using Deepgram's all-in-one voiceAgent component.
Two layers:
1. The OUTER workflow has a browser/v1/voiceSession trigger. When a browser opens a voice
session against this workflow's webhook URL, the platform parses the trigger's websocketTasks
extension and spawns the INNER sub-workflow against the live audio stream.
2. The INNER sub-workflow (embedded as a JSON string under websocketTasks) has one task:
deepgram/v1/voiceAgent. That action terminates the audio loop end-to-end — STT + LLM + TTS
all happen at Deepgram, with the platform just bridging audio bytes in/out.
To use:
1. Create a Deepgram API key (https://console.deepgram.com). Free tier works.
2. Create a Deepgram connection in ByteChef with the key.
3. Import this JSON as a new workflow.
4. Replace 'YOUR_DEEPGRAM_CONNECTION_ID' below with your actual connection id.
5. Publish the workflow to get its webhook URL.
6. Drop the webhook URL into one of:
- AutomationChatModal config: voiceWebhookUrl
- AI Hub workspace settings: Voice webhook URL
- Workflow editor test panel: just open the workflow and click the mic
Customize:
* llmProvider / llmModel: change to anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet, google/gemini-1.5-pro, etc.
* ttsModel: aura-asteria-en, aura-luna-en, aura-stella-en for different voices
* prompt: define the agent's behavior and persona
* greeting: the assistant's opening line when the call starts
Audio format notes:
* sampleRate=16000 on the trigger matches the browser's PCM16 capture rate (see
client/public/mic-worklet.js).
* audioInputEncoding=linear16 + audioInputSampleRate=16000 match the trigger.
* audioOutputSampleRate=24000 is Deepgram's TTS native rate; the browser playback resamples
automatically via the AudioBuffer constructor.
label: Voice Assistant (Deepgram all-in-one)
description: Browser voice trigger feeding Deepgram voiceAgent — handles STT, LLM, and TTS over one provider WebSocket.

parameters.websocketTasks: {"tasks":[{"name":"agent","type":"deepgram/v1/voiceAgent/v1","label":"Voice agent","parameters":{"language":"en","prompt":"You are a helpful voice assistant for ByteChef. Keep responses concise and natural for spoken delivery — avoid markdown, bullet lists, or long paragraphs. When the user asks you to do something you can't do, say so directly rather than improvising.","greeting":"Hi there! How can I help?","llmProvider":"open_ai","llmModel":"gpt-4o-mini","ttsProvider":"deepgram","ttsModel":"aura-asteria-en","audioInputEncoding":"linear16","audioInputSampleRate":"16000","audioOutputEncoding":"linear16","audioOutputSampleRate":"24000"},"connections":{"deepgram_1":{"componentName":"deepgram","componentVersion":1,"connectionId":"YOUR_DEEPGRAM_CONNECTION_ID"}}}]}
